offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient reporting causes project delays. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient generation of project status reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers about reporting issues
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for construction project management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 projects
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the reporting process
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving of common report templates
Set default reminders for report submissions
Enable CSV import for existing project data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
